name: Safety and Efficacy of KH-1 for Stimulating Autophagy in Non-diabetic Adults With Elevated Blood Glucose Concentration
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov completed 42-participant randomized quadruple-masked KH-1 trial in non-diabetic adults with elevated blood glucose, with insulin-resistance, autophagy, inflammatory, cardiovascular, immune, safety, and quality-of-life endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
